purpose: Remove development-stage and maturity messaging from the public platform-v7 homepage while preserving factual integration boundaries, RU/EN/ZH completeness, mobile-first behavior and the transaction-centric architecture.
forbiddenCapabilities: claiming that a bank, FGIS, EDI or other external system is connected when no verified runtime evidence exists
changing API, database, RBAC, TAI runtime, deployment topology or protected routes
introducing pilot, demo, pre-live, in-development or maturity-status wording into the public homepage
using Netlify or Vercel as production evidence
